data.content: Implementation already merged to main via commits 51a59f08 and 345d04a3. Previous shipment review failed only due to dirty local workspace, not code issues. Verified: all quality gates pass (lint clean, typecheck clean, 2092/2092 tests pass). Search matches beat IDs (full and suffix), aliases, title, and description across both beads and knots backends. State filter is bypassed when search query is present.
